name: Gmail Inbox → AI Analysis → Slack Digest
description: Receives Gmail push notifications via webhook, uses an LLM to classify and summarize the email, then posts the digest to a Slack channel.

config.SYSTEM_PROMPT: You are an email assistant. Summarize the email in 1-2 sentences, classify it as action-required or informational, and extract any deadlines mentioned.

required_secrets.description: Gmail OAuth2 refresh token with gmail.readonly scope
Slack bot token with chat:write scope

replacements.config_delta: Replace OAUTH_TOKEN_SECRET+WATCH_LABELS with SIGNING_SECRET_PATH+EVENT_TYPES (e.g. ['app_mention']). Required secret: slack/signing_secret instead of google/gmail_oauth_token. Use to trigger AI analysis on Slack messages or mentions.

Replace CHANNEL with TO (extracted from original sender), SUBJECT (e.g. 'Re: ' + original subject), BODY. google/gmail_oauth_token already required; slack/bot_token no longer needed. Use to reply-by-email instead of posting to Slack.
